description_long: This is a rectangular, messenger-style grocery bag with a long, adjustable black shoulder strap attached at both ends. The main body of the bag is made from a reddish-brown, slightly glossy material that appears to be repurposed or upcycled, possibly from tarpaulin or vinyl, with visible seams and some printed markings. The front flap covers the main compartment and features a small patch with branding and a faint, partially visible number or code on the side. The bag's structure is semi-rigid, maintaining its boxy shape even when not fully loaded, and the surface shows a subtle texture with some wear, suggesting durability. The sides are narrow, and the bag is relatively slim, making it suitable for carrying groceries or personal items in an urban environment. No groceries or contents are visible inside the bag, and the main opening is covered by the front flap.
description: A rectangular, reddish-brown messenger-style grocery bag with a black shoulder strap and a front flap featuring branding and printed markings. The bag is slim, semi-rigid, and made from a durable, slightly glossy material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reddish-brown flap with faint vertical markings and a black shoulder strap; some printed numbers are visible on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the bag and the attachment of the black strap; minimal surface detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full reddish-brown back panel, visible branding patch, and the continuation of the black strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the bag and the strap attachment, similar to view 1 but mirrored.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Branding patch and printed numbers visible on the exterior flap and side
